title: Missing DB.DBA.SPARQL_INS_OR_DEL_OR_MODIFY_CTOR_FIN permission for DELETE
key_bug_features: Missing permission for executing DELETE SPARQL command
bug_feature_seed: SPARQL PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX ex: <http://www.example.org/> INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://www.example.org/> { ex:a rdf:type ex:Title . ex:a ex:hasFeature ex:f1 . ex:a ex:hasItem ex:t1 . } };

SPARQL PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX ex: <http://www.example.org/> WITH <http://www.example.org/> DELETE { ?b ?c ?d } WHERE { ?b a ex:Title ; ex:hasFeature ?f ; ex:hasItem ?t . ?b ?c ?d . };
SPARQL PREFIX ex: <http://www.example.org/> SELECT * FROM <http://www.example.org/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o };
SPARQL PREFIX ex: <http://www.example.org/> WITH <http://www.example.org/> DELETE { ?s ?p ?o } WHERE { ?s ?p ?o };
SPARQL PREFIX ex: <http://www.example.org/> WITH <http://www.example.org/> DELETE { ?s ?p ?o } WHERE { ?s ?p ?o };
SPARQL PREFIX ex: <http://www.example.org/> INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://www.example.org/> { ex:b ex:hasItem ex:t2 . } };
SPARQL PREFIX ex: <http://www.example.org/> WITH <http://www.example.org/> DELETE { ?b ex:hasItem ?t } WHERE { ?b ex:hasItem ?t };
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ex:Title (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE ex:Feature (id INT PRIMARY KEY, title_id INT, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (title_id) REFERENCES ex:Title(id));
INSERT INTO ex:Title (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Sample Title');
INSERT INTO ex:Feature (id, title_id, description) VALUES (1, 1, 'Sample Feature');
DELETE FROM ex:Feature WHERE title_id = (SELECT id FROM ex:Title WHERE name = 'Sample Title');
